name: Mohammad Thoufiq M
heading: Meet Your Instructor
titleLead: Learn From a Working Product Designer With
bio: When I started learning design, the hardest part wasn’t the tools — it was understanding how to actually think like a UI/UX designer.

stats.title: 150+ Educational Videos
stats.body: Created 150+ design and career-focused videos, reaching 3.5M+ viewers and helping thousands understand product design.

stats.title: 25+ Real-World Projects
stats.body: Worked on 25+ real projects across industries like Web3, FinTech & Healthcare product design.

stats.title: 50+ Freelance Projects Delivered
stats.body: Designed UX and UI solutions for startups, businesses, and digital products through freelance collaborations.

stats.title: 80% Placement Success
stats.body: Students guided through my mentorship have achieved a 75% placement rate in product design roles.
